iti66:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti66:2.1: “Monks, there are these three kinds of cleanliness.
iti66:2.3: Bodily cleanliness, verbal cleanliness, mental cleanliness.
iti66:2.4: These are the three kinds of cleanliness.”
iti66:3.1: Clean in body, clean in speech,
iti66:3.3: one who is clean, consummate in cleanliness,
iti66:3.4: is said to have abandoned the All.
